basic_details.job_title: ICSI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 05 Director, Executive and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI)
basic_details.short_information: Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) Director (Academics) Notification 2026 has been released on 30-05-2026 on the official website of ICSI. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the ICSI Director (Academics) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Director: 50 years, Deputy Director: 40 years, Executive: 35 years
age_limit.details: Director: 50 years Deputy Director: 40 years Executive: 35 years Age as on 01-05-2026

qualification.education_qualification: A Graduate degree in Commerce from a recognized University and ACS/ACA/ACMA, PG degree in Economics/Commerce/Management/Law or equivalent with 50% marks
qualification.details: Director (Academics): A Graduate degree in Commerce from a recognized University and ACS/ACA/ACMA OR PG degree in Economics/Commerce/Management/Law or equivalent with 50% marks; 15 years experience out of which 7 years in Senior Executive position. Deputy Director (Academics): A Graduate degree in Commerce from a recognized University and ACS/ACA/ACMA OR PG degree in Economics/Commerce/Management/Law or equivalent with 50% marks; 9 years experience. Executive (Academics): A Graduate degree in Commerce from a recognized University and ACS/ACA/ACMA OR PG degree in Economics/Commerce/Management/Law or equivalent with 50% marks; Minimum 5 years experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level 13 (123100-215900), Level 11 (67700-208700), Level 8 (47600-151100) as per 7th CPC Pay Matrix
salary_details.details: Director (Academics): Rs. 29.44 Lakhs per Annum (approx.) Deputy Director (Academics): Rs. 16.81 Lakhs per Annum (approx.) Executive (Academics): Rs. 11.54 Lakhs per Annum (approx.)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICSI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ICSI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the ICSI Recruitment 2026 is 19th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in ICSI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 5 vacancies are available for the posts of Director (Academics), Deputy Director (Academics), and Executive (Academics) in the ICSI Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Director (Academics) post?
faq.answer: For the Director (Academics) post, candidates need a Graduate degree in Commerce and ACS/ACA/ACMA or a PG degree in Economics/Commerce/Management/Law with 50% marks, along with 15 years of experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Executive (Academics) post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Executive (Academics) post is 35 years as of 1st May 2026. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for ICSI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for ICSI Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Candidates must visit the official website or use the provided link to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the recruited posts?
faq.answer: The salary varies by post, with the Director post falling under Level 13 (123100-215900), Deputy Director under Level 11 (67700-208700), and Executive under Level 8 (47600-151100) as per the 7th CPC Pay Matrix.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for ICSI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for ICSI Recruitment 2026 typically includes a Written Test, followed by an Interview, and Document Verification for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for ICSI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no specific application fee is mentioned in the official notification for ICSI Recruitment 2026. Candidates should verify this on the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF for ICSI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the Important Links section on this page or by visiting the official website of ICSI. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India?
faq.answer: The official website of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) is www.icsi.edu. Candidates can visit this site for more information and to access the application portal.
